alerts.bottle: High Point ABC Board official product/inventory page
alerts.source: NC board release watch - High Point ABC Board
alerts.inventorySemantics: NC is fragmented by local ABC boards. Wake can expose store-level inventory, NC Stock Shipped Data gives board-level shipment evidence, and the NC warehouse page is statewide early-warning radar. Board/warehouse signals are useful planning intelligence but must not be described as exact shelf inventory.
alerts.reason: Previously seen signal for High Point ABC Board official product/inventory page in NC is absent from current run.
alerts.evidence: High Point ABC Board exposes an official product/inventory page at https://highpointabc.com/products. Bourbon Signal treats this as a release-watch source surface; users should verify current rules and dates at the source.
